creator: grosser@fim.uni-passau.de
text:
devel/ppl is out of date.

A recent version of PPL is one of the requirements to enable the GRAPHITE optimization framework in gcc 4.4.

Fix: 

Patch available at

http://students.fim.uni-passau.de/~grosser/ppl-0.10.2-upgrade.patch.txt 

Unfortunately to big to attach it.
